reviews.originalComment: Sangat buruk saya sudah memesan melalui aplikasi ketika saya hubungi via WA maupun datang secara langsung tidak ada tanggapan, jangan menginap disini sebelum anda menyesal
reviews.reviewComments: Very bad, I already ordered through the app and when I contacted via WhatsApp or came directly there was no response, don't stay here unless you want to regret it.

reviews.reviewPositives: Соотношение цены и качества прекрасное . Рядом много кафе . В здании чисто , красиво , комфортно, просторно . Место , где находится отель , рядом с центром города.
reviews.reviewNegatives: Не помешала бы звукоизоляция . Как внутри здания , так и снаружи . И воду погорячее можно организовать в душе .

reviews.originalComment: 部屋もきれいだし、スタッフも親切。共有の冷蔵庫もあり飲料・果物が美味しくいただける。ただ、昼にスカッフがおらずタクシーが呼べなかった。ちかくの親切なアバさんにお願いして無事空港にたどりついた。
reviews.reviewComments: The room is clean, and the staff is friendly. There is a shared refrigerator where you can enjoy delicious drinks and fruits. However, there was no staff around during the day, and I couldn't call a taxi. I asked a kind local person nearby for help, and I successfully made it to the airport.

reviews.reviewPositives: Very friendly owner and very nice location.
reviews.reviewNegatives: It was all fine but the prayer from the mosque is really loud and woke me up.

reviews.reviewComments: The room is wide enough, and the staff were all hospitable.

reviews.reviewTitle: The Best Stay I’ve Ever Had!
reviews.reviewPositives:
I loved this property so much! The location is perfect with many food choices, and coffee shops nearby. 

The guest house is quiet, clean and always smells so fresh. 
The best thing for me was the host Hadian he’s really the best host I’ve ever had we spent so much time together exploring the city and even his family treated me very well. 

The WiFi was fast and always working which is good for me as I used it for business.

I will definitely book this guest house again and stay for much longer next time.
